title: TypeError during Supabase user role verification
symptom: When attempting to verify user roles in Supabase, a TypeError occurs stating 'Cannot read properties of null (reading 'map')'. This prevents the workflow from executing correctly.
not_this_if: User roles are correctly defined and accessible
root_cause: The error occurs when the code attempts to access the 'map' function on a null value, indicating that the expected data structure for user roles is not being returned or is not initialized properly.
fix_steps: Ensure that user roles are correctly set up in Supabase
Connect roles via the Supabase Auth settings
agent_instruction: Check and connect user roles in Supabase Auth settings to resolve the TypeError.
